About: It is about a Chinese cross-and-circle board game.
Affects: It affects opponents by sending their pieces back to their hangars when landing on certain spaces.
BelongsTo: It belongs to Chinese modern board games.
ConsistsOf: It consists of four starting hangars.
It consists of a multicolored track.
It consists of four arrow-shaped home zones.
It consists of four shortcut spaces.
It consists of four sets of 4 colored airplane pieces.
DevelopedIn: It was developed in the 20th century.
HasA: It has four starting hangars in each corner.
It has a multicolored track consisting of 52 spaces.
It has four arrow-shaped home zones.
It has four sets of 4 colored airplane pieces.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by airplanes as pieces.
It is characterized by four starting hangars in each corner.
It is characterized by a multicolored track consisting of 52 spaces.
It is characterized by four arrow-shaped home zones.
It is characterized by four shortcut spaces.
It is characterized by four sets of 4 colored airplane pieces.
It is characterized by a die.
IsA: It is a Chinese cross-and-circle board game.
It is a Western game similar to Ludo.
It is an Indian game similar to Pachisi.
It is a classic modern board game of China.
KnownAs: It is known as 飛行棋.
KnownFor: It is known for its airplane pieces.
It is known for being a Chinese cross-and-circle board game.
It is known for its spread around the world, especially in Africa.
ManufacturedBy: It was manufactured by different companies.
PerformedBy: It was performed by two to four players.
UsedAs: It is used as a game.
It is used as a unit when stacked.
UsedFor: It is used for playing a board game.
It is used for moving pieces around a track.
It is used for determining movement by rolling a die.
It is used for sending opponent pieces back to their hangar.
It is used for jumping spaces.
It is used for taking shortcuts.
It is used for winning the game by reaching the center base.
UsedIn: It is used in the center of the board.
It is used in the hangars.
It is used in the launch area.
It is used in the track.
It is used in the home zones.
It is used in shortcut spaces.
UsedTo: It is used to get all own plane pieces from hangars into the base of opponents colour.
It is used to take a piece out of the hangar onto the corresponding adjacent launch area.
It is used to move a piece that is already on the board clockwise around the track.
It is used to give a player another roll.
It is used to return pieces to their hangar.
It is used to jump four spaces ahead.
It is used to take the shortcut.
It is used to send opposing planes back to their hangars.
It is used to fly into the center base on an exact roll.
It is used to place a plane face down back in its own hangar.
